channel.title: Very Important People
channel.description: Latest releases from Very Important People on Dropout.tv

item.title: Last Looks: Greg and Charlotte Excitement
item.description:
Tamar Levine and Alex Perrone talk about how Brennan Lee Mulligan and Izzy Roland transformed into Greg and Charlotte Excitement.

Duration: 04:25

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, tamar levine, alex perrone, brennan lee mulligan, izzy roland, behind the scenes

item.title: Greg and Charlotte Excitement
item.description:
Vic interviews married wrestlers Greg & Charlotte Excitement (Brennan Lee Mulligan & Izzy Roland).

Duration: 24:59

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, brennan lee mulligan, izzy roland

item.title: Last Looks: Claude McCaw
item.description:
Tamar Levine, Alex Perrone, and Bruce Spaulding Fuller talk about how Alex Song-Xia transformed into Claude McCaw.

Duration: 05:02

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, tamar levine, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, alex song-xia, behind the scenes

item.title: Claude McCaw
item.description:
Vic interviews Claude McCaw (Alex Song-Xia) and discusses their evil business, McCaw Industries.

Duration: 13:22

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, alex song-xia
